programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Suzanne wrote Dr. Phil about her tumultuous relationship with her younger boyfriend. Ryan was first online friends with Suzanne’s twin sister, Michelle, who passed away, but left items to Ryan in her will, of which Suzanne is named executor. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rachel says she hates her mother, Aundrea, who is an embarrassment, and who stole her childhood due to her alcoholism & a pill addiction. Aundrea admits she's an alcoholic and a liar, & says she is keeping two dark and embarrassing secrets.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blake, 26, is a college graduate and on the dean's list with a 3.5 GPA. He has thrown it away to sit around and smoke pot in the rent-free house his mom supplied. He has aspirations, like stripping off his shirt to show off his self-professed buff body.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bobby wants to peacefully co-parent with his ex-wife, Andrea, but says she's a liar, & a sex-addict who exposes their son, Kayden, 6, to her lifestyle. He says her bedroom a revolving door of men. Andrea says Bobby is obsessed with ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amber was the envy of her friends, married, 2 kids, a beautiful home & 6-figure salary as a top-selling real estate agent. When she and her husband divorced, her life spiraled out of control. Dr.Phil examines Amber's fall from grace. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin & Daniel, both want custody of daughters, Dani, 14, & Zoey, 12, who've been torn between both parents for years. What will happen to Dani and Zoey? Find out as we meet the whole family,to see if they are ready to receive help and move forward.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Angie & Hannah who say step-father & step-grandfather Ralph routinely sexually abused them. For the first time in 15 years, Angie & Hannah are face-to-face with Ralph, who denies all claims. Is Ralph cleared by a polygraph test?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Janice & Wayne spoke with Dr. Phil as daughter Darbi, 16, had been missing for 24 days. Dr. Phil asked if the parents were more focused on their hatred toward each other than working together to find their child. Hours later, they got a phonecall. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank questions whether a run-in with community activists was an accident or a setup. Also, Jamie strives to rely less on Frank's input to makes decisions, Erin helps Anthony protect his daughter and ex-wife from a dangerous psychiatric patient.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a former officer waits on Frank at a restaurant, he feels guilty about the circumstances surrounding why she was fired, and he tries to reinstate her.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A medium approaches Danny and Baez claiming to know what happened to a woman who was found dead of an apparent suicide. Also, Jamie and Eddie help a woman who bought cheap insulin online that nearly killed her son.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: It's Reagan versus Reagan when Danny goes against Jamie's direct order during a hostage negotiation. Also, Nicky asks Erin for help when her friend is in jeopardy of losing his scholarship because of a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While off duty, Danny encounters a gas station robbery in progress and is forced to use his weapon, leaving him shaken and his family and co-workers concerned.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a woman is murdered in her apartment, Danny and Baez turn to her daughter, Margo (Lyrica Okano), for help, but instead she complicates the investigation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank's longtime friend Lenny reveals to him that an upcoming exposé will air some of the NYPD's dirty laundry. Also, Erin must decide how to charge a doctor whose experimental treatments led to the death of his terminally ill daughter.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After an incident where Officer Witten's (Lauren Patten) backup physically could not keep up with a chase, Frank must decide whether to implement a more rigorous fitness test for the NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After someone breaks into Luis Delgado's (Lou Diamond Phillips) home and kills his wife, Luis and Danny team up to take down the vicious murderer who may also be responsible for Linda's death.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin must convince Frank to back a new state police bill as part of a bargain she made with Governor Mendez (David Zayas). Also, Danny and Baez pursue the same perp twice after the DA's office is unconvinced by their initial lineup.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: DNA evidence in a murder case leads Danny and Baez to identical twins with identical alibis. Also, Frank learns Nicky is interviewing for a job at the Justice Coalition, which he rarely sees eye-to-eye with.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: As Jamie and Eddie's wedding day approaches, Frank worries about the toast he'll deliver at their rehearsal dinner. Also, Erin interviews a witness whose story leads her to doubt Eddie's honesty.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Stargate Command is baffled by the arrival of several virtually identical SG-1 teams and must find a way to return them to their respective universes before calamity occurs. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez grapple with a year-old homicide investigation brought to their attention by Maggie (Callie Thorne), the medium who previously helped them solve a case.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss hires Waldo as a ranch hand after keeping Waldo from killing himself. Hoss soon learns that Waldo is lousy at his job and only causes problems for everyone else due to his clumsiness.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe teaches Johnny Chapman how to use a gun for defense. What Joe doesn't see is the deadly consequences that it has in the long run when Johnny becomes a gunfighter.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After inadvertantly falling into the river, Adam is rescued by Tom Wilson. Wilson has feelings for Sue Miller, which bring him into trouble after her father is killed.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Outlaws capture Ben and hide him in an abandoned mine, holding him for a ransom. The boys must come up with a plan to save him before it's too late.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Lafe Jessup doesn't really want to be married, and now he's about to be a father! The horse wrangler finds a fight with Hoss at his reluctance to perform his duties.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Sam Logan is released from jail after serving his twenty year sentence for stealing $100,000 worth of gold dust. He is followed by a bounty hunter who believes Sam will lead him to where the gold is buried.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A conman heads into town and takes advantage of the Cartwrights with a fake land deal. The conman ends up staying in Virginia city to run an orphanage.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An author is inspired to write about the heroic Cartwrights after watching first-hand as they fight off an attempted robbery of a stage.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Joe and his friend Mitch go after a puma, Joe climbs a big peak and throws his gun up higher, intending to crawl up after it.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras la UAC continua persiguiendo a los ladrones, el equipo determina que los sospechosos tienen un objetivo más grande en D.C., y con uno del equipo como rehén, tienen que trabajar rápidamente para desactivar una situación explosiva.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Gibbs acepta ayudar a la amiga de la infancia de su hija, quien murió hace 15 años, se encuentra en el centro de un viaje emotivo e introspectivo a su pasado, llevando a una impactante y dolorosa conclusión.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la muerte de un almirante de la Marina, la cual toma un giro inesperado y emotivo cuando se encuentran con una mujer buscando a su marido desaparecido, un refugiado político africano.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS cuida a un niño de nueve años cuyo padre es buscado por un caso de asesinato sin resolver.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS paga un alto precio cuando intentan localizar a un marino que cree que aún se encuentra en Irak.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Es Reagan contra Reagan cuando Danny va en contra de la orden directa de Jamie durante una negociación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Mientras estaba fuera de servicio, Danny se encuentra con un robo en una gasolinera y se ve obligado a usar su arma, dejándolo conmovido y su familia y compañeros de trabajo preocupados.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect sends police on a high-speed chase, a wanted man attempts to flee from officers on a bicycle, and security cameras catch a man trying to conceal items in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicycle chase leads to a bizarre reunion between an officer and suspect, police respond to a domestic dispute, and officers respond to a suspicious vehicle in a local park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The whole team must investigate a crime where a husband and his porn star wife were murdered execution-style.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Sara deal with the death of what at first seems to be a transvestite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A mutilated female body is discovered tied to the undercarriage of a bus carrying prisoners from a women's correctional facility after a severed arm flies out from beneath the vehicle and strikes a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A violent murder in a casino parking garage and another episode in the police interview room lead the CSIs to one shocking discovery after another.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine, and Nick try to determine the cause of a house fire that kills a teenage girl. The fire is in the same neighborhood as a similar arson fire. Grissom and Sara investigate a man found dead with letter tiles in his stomach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine, and Nick investigate the death of a runner during a competition. Meanwhile, Sara and Warrick investigate the death of a couple in a hotel room, initially thought to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A roller coaster runs off its track, leaving six people dead. The CSI team investigates whether this was an accident or foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team must investigate when Calleigh is run off the road into a canal, compromising crime scene evidence she just collected.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After an entire neighborhood learns that they are being forced out of their homes, the local politician supporting eminent domain is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs must investigate a strange case involving voodoo and are spooked when bizarre accidents start happening around the lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A kidnapping case becomes personal for Horatio and the CSI team when the victim unexpectedly turns out to be Boa Vista's sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando ocurre un asesinato durante una carrera de caballos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que Ryan tiene un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Alexx Woods regresa a Miami cuando un asesino pone en peligro la vida de Calleigh y Ryan. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI enfrentan cara a cara a un abogado defensor que puede o no estar involucrado en el encubrimiento de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando unos piratas se apoderan de un yate de lujo, el futuro de Delko como CSI se ve amenazado justo cuando su relación con Calleigh pasa al siguiente nivel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI hace un descubrimiento impactante sobre su víctima de asesinato, mientras Horatio intenta salvar a su hijo de la conducta errática de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una azafata es asesinada en vuelo, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren todos los trapos sucios de los viajes en avión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una violación de domicilio se vuelve mucho más que eso cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren que son el blanco de la mafia rusa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la vida de un niño inocente está en peligro, Ryan, a la larga, se ve obligado a traicionar a Horatio Caine y al resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una estrella de telerrealidad es asesinada, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se adentran en el mundo escandaloso y sensual de un programa de televisión de citas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI trabajan para averiguar por qué una familia aparentemente normal fue blanco de un brutal ataque con granadas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el caso de un hombre hervido vivo, Julia se descontrola y uno de los secretos más oscuros del equipo sale a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio lucha para salvar a Yelina y cuando Delko se opone a la súplica de Calleigh y ayuda a su peligroso padre, su vida corre peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Mientras la vida de Delko pende de un hilo, Horatio vuelve 12 años en el tiempo para revelar cómo se conocieron y se convirtieron en un equipo los CSI de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac goes up against the deputy chief of detectives when a dark secret from the chief's past threatens his reputation and family.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the CSI New York team search for the killer of a department store manager found dead in a holiday display window.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man in full clown costume shoots a bakery owner, the CSIs investigate and discover a decision from Flack's past that may put him in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)
programme.desc: Mac investiga un caso de hace 20 años que involucra a un niño desaparecido cuando encuentran asesinado al principal sospechoso en el aniversario de la desaparición del niño.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo de alta presión de las escuelas preparatorias de elite cuando un estudiante es asesinado mientras estudia para el examen de ingreso a la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando descubren que la detective Lovato es una agente encubierta, el equipo de CSI investiga a la pandilla callejera latina en la que ella se infiltró.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Mátalos suavemente

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: código sombra
programme.desc: El suspenso no se detiene mientras el recluta de la CIA Ryan queda atrapado en una peligrosa red de intriga y espionaje. Ryan debe pasar de soldado a analista a agente operativo para detener un complot terrorista devastador contra EE. UU.

programme.title: El hombre del presidente
programme.desc: Un agente secreto altamente clasificado del presidente de Estados Unidos debe encontrar a un intrépido sustituto que se haga cargo de sus peligrosísimas misiones militares.

programme.title: Un plan infalible
programme.desc: Un ingenioso trío de ladrones disfrazados debe luchar por sus vidas y el botín cuando un verdadero criminal maestro los chantajea para que planifiquen y ejecuten un atraco de $20 millones. Protagonizada por Ryan Reynolds.

programme.title: 12 horas
programme.desc: Amanda Seyfried (El precio del mañana, La chica de la capa roja) interpreta este intenso thriller acerca de una joven desesperada que, tras ser ignorada por la policía, debe salir a buscar al asesino serial que ella cree secuestró a su hermana menor.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: El gran asalto
programme.desc: En una patrulla, un policía veterano y su compañero quedan atrapados con un pasajero en un enfrentamiento con exmercenarios que roban un banco.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y la ultima cruzada
programme.desc: No hay nada más emocionante que intentar seguir el ritmo de los Jones en «Indiana Jones y la última cruzada». Los enemigos nazis de Indy han vuelto y han secuestrado a su padre, en su intento por localizar el sagrado Santo Grial.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal
programme.desc: En «Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal», Indy (Harrison Ford) intenta adelantarse a una brillante y bella agente (Cate Blanchett) en la búsqueda de la mística y todopoderosa calavera de cristal de Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de LecterCorp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: Ruth, una chica sorprendente
programme.desc: En esta sátira, Ruth Stoops, una mujer despreocupada y embarazada por quinta vez, se convierte inesperadamente en el centro de un intenso debate nacional, cuando lo único que quiere es seguir viviendo su vida sin complicaciones.

programme.title: Shaolin Soccer (en español)
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: No es otra tonta película de comida
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds, Anna Ferris, y Justin Long son unos jóvenes que trabajan de meseros mientras buscan el significado de la vida, el amor, y la amistad, en esta divertida comedia.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Tiro Penal (Jugar Duro)
programme.desc: Vinnie Jones es Danny Meehan, una superestrella del fútbol que lo tenía todo; dinero, coches deslumbrantes y una top model por novia. Pero ahora todo se ha terminado y cuando acaba entre rejas por golpear a un policía, las cosas cambian de mal a peor.

programme.title: Shaolin Soccer (en español)

programme.title: Ramona
programme.desc: Ramona acaba de mudarse a Madrid con su novio, esperando tener un nuevo comienzo.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Canela (LAS)
programme.desc: Restaurant owner Tere has fallen into a state of depression after the tragic death of her daughter. With her eatery facing crisis, granddaughter Maria steps in to help Tere rediscover her love of good food and save the business from disarray.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba a ladrón
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Milagro de navidad
programme.desc: La joven Jessica encuentra un reno herido en el bosque nevado. Creyendo que es el verdadero Prancer, promete curarlo para devolvérselo a Papá Noel, y su empeño cambiará mágicamente la vida de toda la gente a su alrededor.

programme.title: El regalo de Navidad
programme.desc: Una periodista decide escribir un artículo navideño sobre su búsqueda de un “Amigo Secreto” de su infancia, cuyo regalo anónimo tuvo un gran impacto en su vida.

programme.title: Todo Gira Alrededor de la Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer debe elegir entre un trabajo de Nochebuena o unas vacaciones con su novio.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: Milagro de navidad

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: Wishmaster: el genio del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un apreciador de joyas recibe una gema antigua, sin saberlo, desata un espíritu inmortal que concede deseos a los humanos a cambio de sus almas.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Yo, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Adam, un monstruo creado por Frankenstein, se da cuenta de que su verdadera misión es salvar a la humanidad después de encontrarse en medio de una guerra entre dos clanes inmortales de demonios y gárgolas.

programme.title: Maggie
programme.desc: Cuando un virus zombie arrasa con la nación, un padre no se detendrá por nada para salvar a su hija infectada en este thriller posapocalíptico protagonizado por Arnold Schwarzenegger y Abigail Breslin.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Ride, Ranger, Ride
programme.desc: Former Texas Ranger Gene Autry receives a commission as lieutenant in the U.S. Cavalry and, along with troopers Frog Millhouse and Rufe Jones, reports to Colonel Summeral at Fort Adobe.

programme.title: Oh, Susanna!
programme.desc: An escaped convict knocks out radio star Gene Autry and swaps clothes with him, making the authorities believe that Gene is the criminal. A pair of traveling troubadours, Frog Millhouse and Professor Daniels, help Gene when he is branded a killer!

programme.title: Oklahoma!
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, several farmers, cowboys and a traveling salesman compete for the romantic favors of various local ladies.

programme.title: The Ride Back
programme.desc: A lawman's grim duty and an outlaw's despair collide as Texas Marshal Hamish (William Conrad) must transport outlaw Kallen (Anthony Quinn) to face justice. But when Hamish is seriously wounded, which will Kallen choose: freedom or redemption?

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Fort Massacre
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: Widower Henry Hobson is a successful bootmaker and a tyrannical father of three daughters who all want to leave him by getting married, but he refuses because marriage traditions require him to pay out settlements.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night (1967)
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: Two For The Seesaw
programme.desc: Robert Wise directs Robert Mitchum and Shirley MacLaine in this spicy and poignant love story about a free-spirited Greenwich Village girl who hooks up with a brooding Nebraska lawyer.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: Set in Paris' famous Red Light district, a rookie policeman (Jack Lemmon) plots to keep a beautiful prostitute (Shirley MacLaine) all to himself in this hit comedy from director Billy Wilder.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: How far should the Findlays go to sell Walter's appliance store? Maude is appalled to find that Walter has supplied a date for a rich investor who's coning to dinner.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Rock of Love: First Annual Bret's Mudbowl
programme.desc: Eight girls remain and Bret wants to see who's willing to get down-n-dirty for him in the First Annual Bret's Mudbowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Tour Bus Challenge
programme.desc: The next test is The Tour Bus Challenge where the ladies compete in various challenges all relating to the life on the road, the winner getting a solo date.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Show Me Your Hits
programme.desc: This week Bret has arranged for his remaining “sexy six” to shoot an album cover for his latest release.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Superfan Challenge
programme.desc: Bret is down to his “fabulous five” and he's getting serious about finding the right girl so he calls on three of his super fans to interrogate the ladies, and choose the girl they think is best.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Vegas Baby!
programme.desc: It's time to see who can handle Bret's rock star life on the road, so the final four girls take the tour bus heading to Vegas where Bret has a big show.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Only three girls are left in the house and now it's time for their parents to meet Bret.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Rose & the Thorn
programme.desc: Things heat up when Bret tells the final 2 girls to pack their bikinis ‘cause they're goin' for an exotic getaway to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30 minute special episode, Bret hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite girls from the series.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Reunion
programme.desc: Bret has gathered all of his ladies for one more wild night while two of the girls reveal that they moved in together and share the same bed.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Back to the Rocking Horse
programme.desc: Twenty more beautiful babes vie for his love and affection. Some bare more than their souls in an attempt to grab Bret's attention.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is in trouble! He was fired from the campaign, his friends think he’s a home-wrecker, and he’s even in a fight with Dallas.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Tristan asks Mr. Yates for some writing help for his MC gig, Mr. Yates suggests he come to his apartment for some extra help. Imogen crushes hard on Jack and is determined to prove she can “roll” with her crowd.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan is warned by Mr. Yates to make his feelings about their affair less obvious at school but Tristan can’t help it, he’s beaming.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë's trial begins and when she fears that she is being painted in a harsh light, she takes matters into her own hands. Becky is torn up about what she’s going to say when she takes the stand as a character witness in her brother’s trial.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The media is abuzz about Zoë’s trial. Feeling hopeless and worried about her tarnished reputation, Zoë is nervous as the verdict approaches. Becky is torn about what to say in her testimony, but deep down knows what she has to do.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Will a superstorm headed for Toronto stall a Degrassi dance? Maya, Zig & Zoë plan to attend but get stranded at the Matlin house.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare is forced to spend the night with Eli while in New York City. Maya and Zoë seek refuge in The Dot with nothing to do but sort out their rivalry. Drew searches for missing Becky. Miles and Tristan share a bonding moment during the storm.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has a serious dilemma that will affect her entire future and confides in Alli and Jenna.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew's not taking the easy way out - he's going to be part of his child's life, whether Clare wants it or not.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frankie isn't a little girl anymore!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has to muster up the courage to tell Eli about her situation.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky and her brother Luke’s relationship is very strained and even with her faith as strong as it is, she can't bring herself to forgive him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya can’t sleep. She’s having nightmares about Miles’ safety, and they’re becoming all too familiar.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë receives texts from an unknown number, threatening that they know the people behind the Power Squad’s scandalous fundraising initiative.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan organizes an intervention for Miles, but it only pushes him further away.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is committed to keeping Becky happy but his situation with Clare has his attention divided.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Simpson calls an assembly to address the offending fundraising website.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi's fundraising scandal threatens to ruin Frankie's relationship with her father.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Hollingsworth’s campaign is in its final stretch, and the stress has him even more tense than usual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi is now in the hands of a new, strict Administrator which means new, strict rules.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Winston is set to play the lead in his musical but is not pleased that Lola could star opposite him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe is facing jail time following the fundraising scandal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky has feelings for Jonah, but she isn't sure what to do with them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Prom is fast approaching, but Clare is MIA from committee meetings.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig is hesitant to let Maya see his new place.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The head pediatric nurse is an ex-prostitute whose former madam is murdered after revealing that she's going to publish a tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan searches for clues to solve the decades-old murder of his mentor at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan recruits his friend Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) to defend Jesse, who's accused of the murder of a resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into Homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam and Dex vow to prove Alexis' innocence and begin a determined campaign. The woman who testified she had seen Alexis on the terrace with Mark had hosted a party that evening and snapped photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean to dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Camp Fear

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Massacre

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: A veces, la balanza de la justicia es equilibrada por unos pocos miligramos de evidencia: un par de fibras, un relleno dental o una mancha en un trozo de cinta. Los casos más grandes a menudo se resuelven con las pistas más pequeñas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Investigación de incendios: antorchas de seguros, quemaduras de personas y asesinatos de incendios: estos crímenes están diseñados para destruir todas las pistas. Pero se puede construir un caso sólido a partir de un montón de cenizas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Identificar restos quemados: es difícil investigar un asesinato si no hay cuerpo, y quemar a la víctima es un método tradicional de destruir pruebas físicas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Memphis, Tennessee, un horrible crimen dejó aterrados a los residentes de la zona. Cuando una madre joven y acaudalada fue secuestrada frente a la casa de sus suegros, la policía tenía muchos sospechosos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de aventuras! Desde armar un puesto de limonadas hasta convertirse en princesas, explorar con la araña Itsy Bitsy y disfrutar de fiestas en pijama, ¡cada momento es mágico!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en la diversión acuática, embarcados en aventuras que los harán chapotear.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Disfruta el día con Little Angel explorando el zoológico y aprendiendo sobre los animales y sus hábitos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels en un viaje especial a través de un día lleno de exploración y aprendizaje. Desde ordenar la casa hasta recordar su infancia, cada momento trae nuevos descubrimientos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un día lleno de emoción y asombro. Desde aprender el baile de Baby Shark hasta explorar la magia de mezclar colores, jugar y descubrir sorpresas, ¡es un viaje de diversión y descubrimiento que te dejará sonriendo!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día de aventuras con Little Angel! Desde aprender a comer sano hasta ordenar, pasando por la construcción, la seguridad a la hora de comer, consejos para cuidar niños y trucos de astucia, ¡es un viaje de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una divertida fiesta familiar, donde se embarcan en una serie de aventuras que celebran las alegrías de la unión y el aprendizaje.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un divertido viaje lleno de chapuzones sobre la natación segura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día lleno de alegría junto a Little Angel y sus amigos! Desde expresar su amor por mamá hasta aventuras con juguetes, ¡únete a este viaje lleno de diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus fiestas de juegos, donde descubren la alegría de ayudar y marcar la diferencia, demostrando que incluso los actos de bondad más pequeños pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Entra en un mundo de encanto y diversión eternos con Little Angel y las mejores canciones infantiles.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Súbete a bordo de un viaje lleno de diversión y risas mientras Little Angel se adentra en una aventura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel en un día de diversión y aprendizaje! Desde sorpresas hasta bailar, clases de ballet, higiene dental, tareas domésticas, cuidado del estómago y observar estrellas, ¡es una aventura de risas y descubrimientos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
